simpleskinswapper.title: Simple Skin Swapper
simpleskinswapper.screen.carousel.title: Skin Swapper
simpleskinswapper.screen.carousel.no_ski: No skins found. Add PNG files to .minecraft/skins/
simpleskinswapper.config.title: Simple Skin Swapper Config
Command sent to the server when applying a skin. Leave empty to disable.
Connect to a server to configure its command.
After applying a skin, the mod sends
a command to the server to refresh your skin.
Connect to a server to configure it.
simpleskinswapper.message.swap_in_progre: A skin swap is already in progress.
simpleskinswapper.message.reconnect: Skin uploaded to Mojang. Reconnect to the server to see the change.
simpleskinswapper.message.command_not_de: No command configured for %s. Reconnect to the server to see the change.
simpleskinswapper.message.command_pendin: Skin command sent to the server...
simpleskinswapper.message.command_retry: Skin not yet updated on the server, retrying in %ss (attempt %s/%s)...
simpleskinswapper.message.command_succes: Skin successfully updated on the server!
simpleskinswapper.message.command_give_u: Skin update failed after multiple attempts. Please try again later.
simpleskinswapper.message.command_timeou: The skin command did not respond. The server may have an issue, or the mod may not be detecting the response. Try again later or reconnect to the server.
